title: update_space_fully inlines bump_state_seq SQL: schema drift risk
description: update_space_fully (store.rs:686-702) inlines the same INSERT ON CONFLICT SQL as bump_state_seq (store.rs:963-965). These are currently identical. If state_version schema changes (e.g. a last_modified column), bump_state_seq gets the change but the inlined copies in update_space_fully will not — silently producing inconsistent state tokens. Either call bump_state_seq inside the transaction (requires passing the tx) or add a comment pointing to bump_state_seq as the canonical form.
